summary: Backend-only testing of multi-PDF feature set for Le Journal Hippique PMU'B. Wrote 26 new pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_multi_race_api.py covering /api/races list+filter, /api/races/current, /api/races/{id}, legacy endpoints, /api/search (horses/jockeys + 422), /api/stats/horses/{name} (happy + 404), /api/stats/tipsters leaderboard, /api/admin/verify (200/401), /api/admin/races/upload (401 no-passcode, 400 non-PDF), /api/admin/races/{id}/set-current (200 + /api/race reflects change, 404, 401), /api/admin/races/{id} DELETE (404, 401). All 26 tests PASSED (100%). Actual PDF upload path skipped per instructions (LLM budget exhausted).
critical_code_review_comments: Admin routes are protected only by a static passcode header — acceptable for MVP but consider rate-limiting /api/admin/verify to prevent brute force.
/api/search scans up to 1000 races entirely in memory; acceptable for current volume (dozens/hundreds) but will need indexed text search if scale grows.
/api/admin/races/upload returns 422 from LLM parse failures — the generic exception handler may mask root cause (e.g., LiteLLM 502); consider distinguishing upstream 5xx from validation errors.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager.
Favorites POST still returns 200 on upsert (carry-over from iteration 1).
seed_data_creation: None. Tests are read-only except for set-current which sets the already-current seeded race to current (idempotent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin passcode header is configured with ADMIN_PASSCODE. Seeded race_id = 'prix-pavillon-royal-2026-04-12'. Do not call /api/admin/races/upload with a real PDF unless GEMINI_API_KEY is configured. Search minlength is 2 -> q='x' returns 422. Legacy endpoints read from the `is_current=true` race in the DB. Tipsters leaderboard keys: source, evaluated_races, top_pick_wins, top_pick_top3, base_in_top3, win_rate, top3_rate. Horse stats at /api/stats/horses/{NAME} - name uppercased server-side, URL-encode spaces.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all 26 multi-race backend tests pass. Backend logs confirm the upload endpoint correctly returns 401 without passcode, 400 for non-PDF, and 422 when LLM call fails (LiteLLM BadGatewayError 502 from upstream). Set-current flow verified by follow-up GET /api/race returning the targeted race_id.
